moves.description: The user performs a perfectly timed triple dive, hitting the target with splashes of water three times in a row.

moves.name: Mortal Spin
moves.description: The user performs a spin attack that can also eliminate the effects of such moves as Bind, Wrap, and Leech Seed. This also poisons opposing Pokémon.

moves.name: Doodle
moves.description: The user captures the very essence of the target in a sketch. This changes the Abilities of the user and its ally Pokémon to that of the target.

moves.name: Fillet Away
moves.description: The user sharply boosts its Attack, Sp. Atk, and Speed stats by using its own HP.

moves.name: Kowtow Cleave
moves.description: The user slashes at the target after kowtowing to make the target let down its guard. This attack never misses.

moves.name: Flower Trick
moves.description: The user throws a rigged bouquet of flowers at the target. This attack never misses and always lands a critical hit.

moves.name: Torch Song
moves.description: The user blows out raging flames as if singing a song, scorching the target. This also boosts the user's Sp. Atk stat.

moves.name: Aqua Step
moves.description: The user toys with the target and attacks it using light and fluid dance steps. This also boosts the user's Speed stat.

moves.name: Raging Bull
moves.description: The user performs a tackle like a raging bull. This move's type depends on the user's form. It can also break barriers, such as Light Screen and Reflect.

moves.name: Make It Rain
moves.description: The user attacks by throwing out a mass of coins. This also lowers the user's Sp. Atk stat. Money is earned after the battle.

moves.name: Psyblade
moves.description: The user rends the target with an ethereal blade. This move's power is boosted by 50 percent if the user is on Electric Terrain.

moves.name: Hydro Steam
moves.description: The user blasts the target with boiling-hot water. This move's power is not lowered in harsh sunlight but rather boosted by 50 percent.

moves.name: Ruination
moves.description: The user summons a ruinous disaster. This cuts the target’s HP in half.

moves.name: Collision Course
moves.description: The user transforms and crashes to the ground, causing a massive prehistoric explosion. This move's power is boosted more than usual if it’s a supereffective hit.

moves.name: Electro Drift
moves.description: The user races forward at ultrafast speeds, piercing its target with futuristic electricity. This move's power is boosted more than usual if it's a supereffective hit.

moves.name: Shed Tail
moves.description: The user creates a substitute for itself using its own HP before switching places with a party Pokémon in waiting.

moves.name: Chilly Reception
moves.description: The user tells a chillingly bad joke before switching places with a party Pokémon in waiting. This summons a snowstorm lasting five turns.

moves.name: Tidy Up
moves.description: The user tidies up and removes the effects of Spikes, Stealth Rock, Sticky Web, Toxic Spikes, and Substitute. This also boosts the user’s Attack and Speed stats.

moves.name: Snowscape
moves.description: The user summons a snowstorm lasting five turns. This boosts the Defense stats of Ice types.

moves.name: Pounce
moves.description: The user attacks by pouncing on the target. This also lowers the target's Speed stat.

moves.name: Trailblaze
moves.description: The user attacks suddenly as if leaping out from tall grass. The user's nimble footwork boosts its Speed stat.

moves.name: Chilling Water
moves.description: The user attacks the target by showering it with water that's so cold it saps the target's power. This also lowers the target's Attack stat.

moves.name: Hyper Drill
moves.description: The user spins the pointed part of its body at high speed to pierce the target. This attack can hit a target using a move such as Protect or Detect.

moves.name: Twin Beam
moves.description: The user shoots mystical beams from its eyes to inflict damage. The target is hit twice in a row.

moves.name: Rage Fist
moves.description: The user converts its rage into energy to attack. The more times the user has been hit by attacks, the greater the move's power.

moves.name: Armor Cannon
moves.description: The user shoots its own armor out as blazing projectiles. This also lowers the user’s Defense and Sp. Def stats.

moves.name: Bitter Blade
moves.description: The user focuses its bitter feelings toward the world of the living into a slashing attack. The user's HP is restored by up to half the damage taken by the target.

moves.name: Double Shock
moves.description: The user discharges all the electricity from its body to perform a high-damage attack. After using this move, the user will no longer be Electric type.

moves.name: Gigaton Hammer
moves.description: The user swings its whole body around to attack with its huge hammer. This move can't be used twice in a row.

moves.name: Comeuppance
moves.description: The user retaliates with much greater force against the opponent that last inflicted damage on it.

moves.name: Aqua Cutter
moves.description: The user expels pressurized water to cut at the target like a blade. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

moves.name: Blood Moon
moves.description: The user unleashes the full brunt of its spirit from a full moon that shines as red as blood. This move can't be used twice in a row.

moves.name: Matcha Gotcha
moves.description: The user fires a blast of tea that it mixed. The user's HP is restored by up to half the damage taken by the target. This may also leave the target with a burn.

moves.name: Syrup Bomb
moves.description: The user sets off an explosion of sticky candy syrup, which coats the target and causes the target's Speed stat to drop each turn for three turns.

moves.name: Ivy Cudgel
moves.description: The user strikes with an ivy-wrapped cudgel. This move's type changes depending on the mask worn by the user, and it has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

moves.name: Electro Shot
moves.description: The user gathers electricity on the first turn, boosting its Sp. Atk stat, then fires a high-voltage shot on the next turn. The shot will be fired immediately in rain.

moves.name: Tera Starstorm
moves.description: With the power of its crystals, the user bombards and eliminates the target. When used by Terapagos in its Stellar Form, this move damages all opposing Pokémon.

moves.name: Fickle Beam
moves.description: The user shoots a beam of light to inflict damage. Sometimes all the user's heads shoot beams in unison, doubling the move's power.

moves.name: Burning Bulwark
moves.description: The user's intensely hot fur protects it from attacks and also burns any attacker that makes direct contact with it.

moves.name: Thunderclap
moves.description: This move enables the user to attack first with a jolt of electricity. This move fails if the target is not readying an attack.

moves.name: Mighty Cleave
moves.description: The user wields the light that has accumulated atop its head to cleave the target. This move hits even if the target protects itself.

moves.name: Tachyon Cutter
moves.description: The user attacks by launching particle blades at the target twice in a row. This attack never misses.

moves.name: Hard Press
moves.description: The target is crushed with an arm, a claw, or the like to inflict damage. The more HP the target has left, the greater the move's power.

moves.name: Dragon Cheer
moves.description: The user raises its allies’ morale with a draconic cry so that their future attacks have a heightened chance of landing critical hits. This rouses Dragon types more.

moves.name: Alluring Voice
moves.description: The user attacks the target using its angelic voice. This also confuses the target if its stats have been boosted during the turn.

moves.name: Temper Flare
moves.description: Spurred by desperation, the user attacks the target. This move's power is doubled if the user's previous move failed.

moves.name: Supercell Slam
moves.description: The user electrifies its body and drops onto the target to inflict damage. If this move misses, the user takes damage instead.

moves.name: Psychic Noise
moves.description: The user attacks the target with unpleasant sound waves. For two turns, the target is prevented from recovering HP through moves, Abilities, or held items.

moves.name: Upper Hand
moves.description: The user reacts to the target's movement and strikes with the heel of its palm, making the target flinch. This move fails if the target is not readying a priority move.

moves.name: Malignant Chain
moves.description: The user pours toxins into the target by wrapping them in a toxic, corrosive chain. This may also leave the target badly poisoned.
